#  About Stored Materials On Invoices 
Table of Contents 
##  Common Questions 
  * Do we have to opt-in to the modernized invoice experiences?


### Do we have to opt-in to the modernized invoice experiences?
Yes. To bill for stored materials using the methods described, you must opt-in to the modernized experience for owner invoices and subcontractor invoices. To learn more, see [About Owner Invoices](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/prime-contracts-project/tutorials/about-owner-invoices) and [About Subcontractor Invoices](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/invoicing-project/tutorials/about-subcontractor-invoices).
